identity_status: STRONG ALIGNMENT - Reward does not erase consequence.
major_strengths: Explicit Resource Sink Reporting (measurability before shops)
Strict Safety Bounds (no power creep in stubs)
The economy already reinforces the core identity: reward does not erase consequence.
major_risks: Static Rewards may feel artificial and fail to test variance
Phantom Economy (reported but not deducted wealth)
If resource sinks become too abstract, players may not feel the pressure emotionally.
Rare Material Scarcity (Survivor Marks are currently the only source)
balance_questions: Is 10,000 gold per victory sufficient to outpace compounding sink pressure?
Should DEFEAT_DROP represent a total economic loss?
How does sink pressure scale with floor depth and mutation intensity?
required_followups: Inventory and equipment should make resource drain visible through repair, depletion, capacity, and tradeoff pressure.
